title: onosma fruticosa
intro: Onosma fruticosa, also known as Fruticose Onosma or Yellow Toadflax, is a perennial flowering plant in the borage family (Boraginaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system. Onosma fruticosa can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, making it a valuable addition to herbal remedies.
